visual_description: A woman with long, dark hair, wearing a blue sweatshirt, is shown in a medium close-up. She is pressed against a white wall, her face contorted in a scream. She holds a large, shiny knife in her right hand, pointing it forward. Her left hand is raised to her face, covering her mouth in a gesture of terror. The background consists of the white wall and a lower section of white tiles. The camera is steady, focusing on her panicked expression. The audio is filled with a sense of intense panic and violence. A woman lets out a high-pitched, terrified scream, her voice filled with pure fear and desperation. This is immediately followed by the loud, violent sound of something being forcefully broken, like a wooden door being smashed apart. The camera cuts to a view from behind a broken piece of the white wall. A man with glasses and a plaid shirt suddenly appears through the jagged hole, screaming back at the woman. He is also holding a large knife. The camera remains in a steady, medium close-up, capturing his aggressive and fearful reaction as he looks through the hole. The sequence culminates in a man's guttural, aggressive growl, conveying a menacing and threatening presence. There is no background music
